summary: Comprehensive testing of new applicant verification flow. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all status-based routing: Neu (pending page), Akzeptiert (ID verification page), admin applications management, and admin verifications page.
critical_code_review_comments: Status-based routing in MitarbeiterLayout works correctly for Neu/Akzeptiert/Verifiziert/Freigeschaltet statuses
Password fields in Karriere.jsx properly validate: min 8 chars, password confirmation match
MitarbeiterVerification page correctly shows GwG legal notice and DSGVO privacy notice
AdminVerifications page includes DSGVO warning about no-download policy for ID images
data-testid attributes present on MitarbeiterLogin form fields (employee-login-email, employee-login-password, employee-login-submit)
Admin applications page shows clear status badges: 'Neu' (blue) and 'Wartet auf ID' (green for Akzeptiert)
seed_data_creation: Created pending-test@example.com for testing status 'Neu' pending page
context_for_next_testing_agent: New applicant verification flow fully tested. Status flow: Neu (pending page with clock icon) -> Akzeptiert (ID upload page with front/back image upload) -> Verifiziert (awaiting admin approval page) -> Freigeschaltet (full dashboard). Backend API handles password hashing via passlib/bcrypt. ID images stored as files in /app/backend/uploads/verifications/ and served as base64 to admin. Backend tests cover: application submission with password, applicant login, status checks, admin accept flow, verification upload validation, unlock validation, and verification image/delete endpoints.

karriere_form: Password confirm field (Passwort bestätigen) present - PASS
Zugangsdaten section header with Lock icon - PASS
Password validation (min 8 chars, must match) - PASS
applicant_login: Login at /mitarbeiter/login with application credentials - PASS
status_neu_pending_page: Shows applicant name, position, email - PASS
status_akzeptiert_verification_page: Front/back image upload fields present - PASS
admin_applications: Status column shows 'Neu' and 'Wartet auf ID' badges - PASS
Accept button (UserCheck icon) for Neu applications - PASS
View, delete buttons in actions column - PASS
admin_verifications: DSGVO notice about no-download policy - PASS
